mapper.select: SELECT brd_pst_shr_idx AS idx, brd_pst_shr_uuid AS uuid, brd_pst_idx, shr_tkn, pwd_hash, pwd_use_yn, actv_yn, expr_at, rvkd_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at FROM tb_brd_pst_shr WHERE brd_pst_idx = #{brdPstIdx} AND del_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT brd_pst_shr_idx AS idx, brd_pst_shr_uuid AS uuid, brd_pst_idx, shr_tkn, pwd_hash, pwd_use_yn, actv_yn, expr_at, rvkd_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at FROM tb_brd_pst_shr WHERE brd_pst_idx = #{brdPstIdx} AND actv_yn = 'Y' AND del_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT bs.brd_pst_shr_idx AS idx, bs.brd_pst_shr_uuid AS uuid, bs.brd_pst_idx, bs.shr_tkn, bs.pwd_hash, bs.pwd_use_yn, bs.actv_yn, bs.expr_at, bs.rvkd_at, bs.created_by, bs.updated_by, bs.created_at, bs.updated_at, bs.del_at, bp.brd_pst_uuid, bc.nm AS ctgr_nm, bp.ttl, bp.cntnt, mp.nick_nm AS athr_nick_nm, bp.created_at AS brd_pst_created_at, bp.updated_at AS brd_pst_updated_at, bp.del_at AS brd_pst_del_at FROM tb_brd_pst_shr bs LEFT JOIN tb_brd_pst bp ON bp.brd_pst_idx = bs.brd_pst_idx LEFT JOIN tb_brd_ctgr bc ON bc.brd_ctgr_idx = bp.brd_ctgr_idx LEFT JOIN tb_mbr_prfl mp ON mp.mbr_acct_idx = bp.mbr_acct_idx WHERE bs.shr_tkn = #{shareToken} AND bs.del_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_brd_pst_shr ( brd_pst_idx, shr_tkn, pwd_hash, pwd_use_yn, actv_yn, expr_at, rvkd_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{brdPstIdx}, #{shrTkn}, #{pwdHash}, #{pwdUseYn}, #{actvYn}, #{exprAt}, #{rvkdAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_brd_pst_shr SET actv_yn = 'N', rvkd_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE brd_pst_idx = #{brdPstIdx} AND actv_yn = 'Y' AND del_at IS NULL
